title: build_request allocates Vec<String> from compile-time constant per call
description: methods.rs build_request: CHAT_USING.iter().map(|s| s.to_string()).collect() converts a &[&str] compile-time constant into a Vec<String> of heap-allocated Strings on every method invocation. Every chat_get, message_query, message_create etc. call pays this allocation. Fix: define CHAT_USING as a fn returning Vec<String> once, or store the using list as Vec<String> in a lazy_static/OnceLock, or have JmapRequest use Vec<&'static str> (the using field is never mutated after construction).
